text.title: Freelancer Personal CRM (Minimal) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Freelancer Personal CRM (Minimal) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: create-table
step.action: Create table; add 11 fields; pin URL.

step.name: define-stages
step.action: Add status field with 6 canonical stages.

step.name: backfill
step.action: Import existing records; assign stage + last_touch.

step.name: operate-weekly
step.action: Each Friday: touch every active record; move/archive as needed.

step.name: quarterly-cull
step.action: Archive cold records; update spec last_reviewed.
